title: ASR Outdoor Foldable Portable Clear Camping Collapsible Water Storage Bag 16.9oz
description:
Reusable, lightweight and compact, the ASR Outdoor Foldable Portable Clear Camping Collapsible Water Storage Bag Container Canteen is the perfect water storage carrier designed for all your outdoor and recreational activities, excursions and camping trips alike. And. while the water storage container's intended purpose is predominantly for the aforementioned outdoor pursuits, it can also be put to work for a variety of other uses too! - PORTABLE: Incredibly lightweight, the foldable water carrier easily collapses to take up a fraction of the space compared to other bulky water containers; perfect for travel when space is at a premium; a great item to add to your survival kit, bug out bag or emergency preparedness tote as well.

ASR Outdoor Foldable Portable Clear Camping Collapsible Water Storage Bag 16.9oz

Reusable, lightweight and compact, the ASR Outdoor Foldable Portable Clear Camping Collapsible Water Storage Bag Container Canteen is the perfect water storage carrier designed for all your outdoor and recreational activities, excursions and camping trips alike. And. while the water storage container's intended purpose is predominantly for the aforementioned outdoor pursuits, it can also be put to work for a variety of other uses too!

- PORTABLE: Incredibly lightweight, the foldable water carrier easily collapses to take up a fraction of the space compared to other bulky water containers; perfect for travel when space is at a premium; a great item to add to your survival kit, bug out bag or emergency preparedness tote as well.

Key Features

  • SPACE SAVING CAMPING ESSENTIAL: Lightweight, compact and easily portable, the ASR Outdoor water storage container easily collapses or folds to be flat and will take up no space in your camping gear, backpack or vehicle; perfect for travel when space is at a premium; total fluid capacity is 16.9 ounces
  • MULTIPURPOSE WATER STORAGE CONTAINER: While the material and design of the water storage container is ideal for outdoor activities, it can be used for a variety of other purposes; RV water storage, traveling, picnics, parties, boating, festivals, beach days or as an emergency water storage container in the event of a natural disaster
  • ECO FRIENDLY CHOICE: Instead of purchasing one-time use plastic water storage containers for your next outdoor adventure or camping trip, make an eco-friendly choice by using a reusable container that can easily be refilled time and time again whenever your next outdoor excursion comes about; no need to worry about storing bulky containers, recycling and folds away easily for storage when not in use
  • DURABLE BPA FREE MATERIAL: Made from durable, leak proof, non toxic BPA-free plastic, you never need to worry about breakage, leaking or spilling; the water storage canteen comes with a sturdy plastic release cap to keep water inside and secure at all times; Easy on and off spigot with controllable and steady water flow
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: .15lbs ; Dimensions: 13" x 9"; Material: Plastic; Color: Clear/White

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CWB28L1
  • UPC: 810058484765
  • Color: Clear

- ECO-FRIENDLY: Instead of purchasing one-time use plastic water storage containers for your next outdoor adventure or camping trip, make an eco-friendly choice by using a reusable container that can easily be refilled time and time again; no need to worry about storing bulky containers, recycling and collapses easily for tidy storage when not in use.

- DURABLE: Made from leak-proof plastic, non-toxic BPA-free plastic, you never need to worry about breakage, leaking or spilling; the water storage canteen comes with a sturdy plastic release cap to keep water inside and secure at all times; Easy on and off spigot with controllable and steady water flow.

- SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: the ASR Outdoor collapsible water container is flexible and easily maneuverable for folding and packing; when rolled up the water canteen will take up virtually no space; full fluid capacity = 16.9oz.

And, as mentioned, while the water storage container is ideal for an abundance outdoor activities, it can be used for a variety of other purposes including: RV water storage, traveling, picnics, parties, boating, festivals, beach days or as an emergency water storage container in the event of a natural disaster to name just a few.

An infinitely important part of travel when water might not be accessible, pack the ASR Outdoor Foldable Portable Clear Camping Collapsible Water Storage Bag Container Canteen with you in order to cook, clean, shower and most importantly, stay hydrated!
